text:
is the 4th chapter of the 1st volume and the 4th chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 A skewed view of life from within the 104th Training Corps. 

Summary

A series of gags in which...

...Connie and Sasha are chewed out by Keith Shadis for deciding it is okay if their vertical maneuvering gear is missing a part.

...Mikasa's scarf dyes itself black on its own.

...Eren mistakes Jean's drawing of Mikasa for that of a Titan.

...Mikasa reads that being weak is cuter than being strong. She watches Eren struggle to open a jar and agrees.

...Connie tries Armin's advice to fall asleep by counting Titans, but forgets what he is supposed to do and falls asleep anyway.

...Petra accidentally gives Levi some carrots with a suggestive shape.

...Mikasa is at a girl's night out and wants to bring food back to Eren, only to find out he left with Armin to go stuff themselves.
